product: Feedback model deprecated for AI agents
tagline: The experimental feedback model for AI agents has been deprecated.
what_it_does: The experimental feedback model for AI agents has been deprecated. Starting November 1, 2025, newly deployed agents won't include a feedback model. Upgrade to MLflow 3 and use the log feedback API to collect assessments on agent traces.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: The experimental feedback model for AI agents has been deprecated. Starting November 1, 2025, newly deployed agents won't include a feedback model.
key_takeaway: The experimental feedback model for AI agents has been deprecated.
